---
title: 'Restaurant Equipment Research'
date: '2018-02-21T20:43:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Playground, LLC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4879123363575887972'
blogger_filename: '/2018/02/restaurant-equipment-research.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Playground, LLC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'PreLaunchResearch'
---

<div class="WordSection1">
<div class="MsoNormal">
A small commercial kitchen could cost $20,000-$30,000 conservatively. Sometimes upward of $100,000. However, if we keep the menu simple and needs few, this could be reduced dramatically also. The primary concerns will be the compliance with plumbing/electrical needs and venting/hood requirements.<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<b>&nbsp;Food Vendors /&nbsp; Kitchen Equipment</b></div>
<div>
<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.fsafood.com/main/aboutus.aspx">Food Services of America (FSA)</a></li>
<li><a href="https://sysco.com/">Sysco Foods</a></li>
<ul>
<li>Christian Kearns, Culinary Consultant</li>
<li>kearns.christian@spk.sysco.com</li>
<li>208-777-6215&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<li><a href="http://midwayrestaurantequipment.com/">Midway Restaurant Equipment &amp; Supply</a></li>
<ul>
<li>midwayrestaurantsupply@gmail.com</li>
</ul>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
Types of equipment for consideration and inspiration are:<br />
<br />
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Pizza Oven</b></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pizza-oven-single-12in-8fbd7e2828c0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="305" data-original-width="305" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/pizza-oven-single-12in-14a4c93a41ea.jpg" width="199" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-110947245-burst000-cover-top-fdb10dbebce1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-110947245-burst000-cover-top-c3e5f2f28b84.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112136534-burst000-cover-top-de38d6ba3c4c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112136534-burst000-cover-top-5d3c5167b9cf.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Flat Grill</b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/flat-grill-e8aab2b43edc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="500" data-original-width="500" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/flat-grill-93c6164aafcb.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112248064-8a99791e3cde.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112248064-d56b16fb2273.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112253025-77b7a9192532.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112253025-a7e40892b3cc.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112313773-856ce06d3a02.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112313773-15b2f3a95d04.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112317467-032daf398d02.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112317467-1e7c47239235.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Deep Fryer &amp; French Fry Cutter</b><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/deep-fryer-228994e341c6.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="338" data-original-width="376" height="179" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/deep-fryer-eb754a98e2f7.png" width="200" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-110940452-f5d17fb56d34.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-110940452-3af16e62f967.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-113855746-dc6a3eb2228d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-113855746-1fa01b08cb75.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-113905688-burst000-cover-top-e2aadd8e27ec.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-113905688-burst000-cover-top-3cf63576bf0d.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Refridgerator &amp;&nbsp;</b><b>Freezer</b><br />
<b><br /></b> <b><br /></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112217556-e3834b4cca2f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112217556-e4773241065b.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Cold Food Prep Station</b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111358934-00c28040cdcc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111358934-4bdeb1f53a8c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111402445-7418d4446ed6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111402445-aea832a8ed07.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Stainless Steel Workstations</b></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/stainless-steel-workstations-2881964e4f40.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="225" data-original-width="225" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/stainless-steel-workstations-2881964e4f40.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<b>Three-Basin Sink</b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/three-basin-sink-6280ba4acab0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="225" data-original-width="225" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/three-basin-sink-6280ba4acab0.jpg" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Sink (*2) One dedicated to hand washing, another for fill ups and food prep.</b><br />
<b><br /></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/handwashing-sink-d8d404abbaf0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="224" data-original-width="224" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/handwashing-sink-d8d404abbaf0.jpg" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b><br /></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Utensils &amp; Cutlery</b><br />
I found most of these at the Restaurant Supply were between $3-$9 per item for small items, and a bit more for larger items (like mixing bowls)<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li>Spatulas</li>
<li>Spoons</li>
<li>Whisks</li>
<li>Knives</li>
<li>Mixing Bowls</li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112359861-0f2393a379e7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112359861-912e99e097f6.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112402176-c1240e21aa6f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112402176-9cada07440db.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>Food Serving Materials</b><br />
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="https://www.alibaba.com/countrysearch/CN/biodegradable-food-packaging.html" target="_blank">Alibaba.com</a> has some biodegradable food containers.<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-4-0f6bb1036e35.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="225" data-original-width="225" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-4-0f6bb1036e35.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
Other ideas.</div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-1-eabc42e14568.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="159" data-original-width="159" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-1-eabc42e14568.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-2-c79bfeda3c47.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="159" data-original-width="159" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-2-c79bfeda3c47.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-3-0ee355543dc9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="168" data-original-width="301" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/food-basket-3-0ee355543dc9.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>Also seen/considered: New and Used</b><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111552913-57231fae9692.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111552913-ec2cc4d5ad4d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111557859-8fe535a0fce4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111557859-b097f18f932c.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111603183-fd552e285142.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111603183-84da093bff98.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111608228-15c352878cc0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111608228-e24dbc1f55ab.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111626121-9a29799fc279.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111626121-bd79aca83050.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111629865-2f93c394af53.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111629865-e3e3ee8147f4.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111649827-600ade730869.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="529" data-original-width="1600" height="105" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111649827-14998ad92275.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111747530-burst000-cover-top-20fb25924d76.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111747530-burst000-cover-top-aabd50bc1ae2.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111751635-burst000-cover-top-638dffc09e54.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111751635-burst000-cover-top-3f009e99043f.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111806335-burst000-cover-top-1d87ed8f5c27.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-111806335-burst000-cover-top-bf47b1135166.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112039257-7db06de56365.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112039257-1d2663f72e58.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112230927-93d13e24b065.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20180219-112230927-153eb553c978.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
</div>
